---
title: "Teaching"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

<style>
body {
  text-align: justify}

h1 {
  text-align: center
}
</style>

**Upcoming courses**

<span style="font-size:11pt;font-weight:bold;">Netherlands Graduate School of Linguistics (LOT) Summer School, University of Groningen (June 2026)</span>

* The psycholinguistics of discourse interpretation [[**summer school page**]](https://lotschool.nl/events/lot-summer-school-2026/#toggle-id-7)


<span style="font-size:11pt;font-weight:bold;">Summer School "Methods in Language Sciences", Ghent University (July 2026)</span>

* Regression analysis with R [[**summer school page**]](https://www.mils.ugent.be/)

\



**Past courses**

<span style="font-size:11pt;font-weight:bold;">Summer School "Methods in Language Sciences", Ghent University (2025)</span> 

* Introduction to statistics with R


<span style="font-size:11pt;font-weight:bold;">Göttingen Summer School in Linguistics 7, University of Göttingen (2022)</span> 

* Introduction to generalized linear modeling for linguists


<span style="font-size:11pt;font-weight:bold;">University of Osnabrück (2020 - 2021)</span> 

* Experimental linguistics reading club

* Language and thought

* Basics of data visualization for behavioral scientists [[**course page**]](https://vini-macuch-silva.github.io/basics-of-data-viz-for-behavioral-scientists/)

* Introduction to psycholinguistics: Investigating linguistic meaning [[**course page**]](https://vini-macuch-silva.github.io/intro-to-psycholinguistics/)
